About Us

Where Comfort Meets Elegance

Welcome to Hotel Highway Queen — Ram Nagar, Dudu on the Jaipur–Ajmer Highway. A perfect blend of modern luxury and exceptional hospitality for both business and leisure travelers.

Our motto: "बिन चखे न जाना, क्वीन का खाना" — taste the experience before you leave!

Amenities

Premium Facilities

01
Parking & Travel

Free, secure parking available 24/7 for cars, SUVs, trucks and buses. Our staff also assists guests with local travel guidance, highway directions and nearby attraction info.

02
Daily Housekeeping

Our dedicated housekeeping team ensures your room is spotless every day — fresh linen, clean towels, sanitised bathrooms and tidy surroundings so you feel right at home.

03
In-Room Dining 24/7

Craving a meal at midnight? We've got you. Our full restaurant menu is available for in-room delivery round the clock — from Rajasthani thalis to snacks and chai, any hour of the day or night.

04
Comfort Design

Every room is thoughtfully designed for maximum comfort — powerful AC with individual temperature control, premium bedding, blackout curtains, spacious layouts and modern furnishings for a truly restful stay.

05
Free High-Speed WiFi

Stay connected with blazing-fast complimentary WiFi available everywhere on the property — in your room, lobby, restaurant and outdoor areas. Perfect for business travellers and entertainment alike.

06
24/7 Security

Your safety is our top priority. We have 24/7 CCTV surveillance across all common areas, trained security personnel on duty at all times, and advanced fire safety systems — so you can rest easy.

07
Smart LED TV

Unwind with a Smart LED TV in every room, featuring a wide range of entertainment channels — news, movies, sports and more. Ideal for relaxing after a long drive or a busy day.

08
Climate Control AC

Beat the heat with powerful individual air conditioning in every room. Each unit has independent temperature control so you set your perfect climate — whether it's blazing summer or cool winter nights.

Terms & Conditions

Room Booking Terms

  • All room tariffs subject to applicable taxes and service charges.
  • Room rates may vary depending on season, availability, and selected package.
  • Maximum occupancy as defined at booking. Extra guests may be charged additionally.
  • Children above 12 years considered adults for billing.
  • Hotel reserves the right to revise tariffs without prior notice.
  • Hotel not responsible for any loss, injury, or damage to guests' belongings.
  • Room booking confirmed only after receipt of full advance payment.

Payment Terms

  • Payments via cash, UPI, debit card, or credit card accepted.
  • Rooms not allotted unless full payment received at check-in.
  • All additional charges must be settled before departure.

Check-In & Check-Out

  • Standard check-in time is 12:00 PM and check-out time is 10:00 AM.
  • Early check-in or late check-out subject to availability and extra charges.
  • Valid government-issued photo ID mandatory at check-in.
Privacy Policy

At Hotel Highway Queen, we value your privacy and are committed to protecting your personal information.

Information We Collect

  • Name, contact number, email address provided during booking or inquiry.
  • Identification information required at check-in per government regulations.
  • Payment information processed through secure authorized gateways.

How We Use It

  • To process bookings, payments, and provide hotel services.
  • To communicate confirmations and service-related updates.
  • To improve services and comply with legal requirements.

Data Security

  • We do not sell or rent your personal information to third parties.
  • Access to personal data restricted to authorized personnel only.
Refund Policy

Hotel Highway Queen strives to provide a smooth and transparent booking experience.

Cancellation Policy

  • Cancellations at least 24 hours before check-in eligible for full refund.
  • Cancellations within 24 hours of check-in may not be eligible for refund.
  • No-shows or early check-outs are non-refundable.

Refund Process

  • Refunds apply only for confirmed bookings through official channels.
  • Processing time: 5–7 business days to original payment method.
  • Applicable transaction charges may be deducted from refund amount.
